name: Deploy GitHub Branch → Docker Hub → K3s

nodes.name: GitHub URL + Branch
nodes.notes:
EDIT THESE before Execute workflow:
• github_url — e.g. https://github.com/smitambalia/fast-api
• branch — e.g. main
• deploy_api / deploy_web — true/false

parameters.command:
=/bin/bash -lc 'set -uo pipefail
if [ -f "$HOME/.config/fastapi-ci.env" ]; then set -a; . "$HOME/.config/fastapi-ci.env"; set +a; fi
export GITHUB_URL={{ JSON.stringify($json.clone_url) }}
export BRANCH={{ JSON.stringify($json.branch) }}
export DEPLOY_API={{ $json.deploy_api ? "1" : "0" }}
export DEPLOY_WEB={{ $json.deploy_web ? "1" : "0" }}
export API_IMAGE_REPO="${API_IMAGE_REPO:-smitambalia/n8n}"
export WEB_IMAGE_REPO="${WEB_IMAGE_REPO:-smitambalia/fast-web}"
export KUBECONFIG_PATH="${KUBECONFIG_PATH:-$HOME/.kube/k3s.yaml}"
export WORK_ROOT="${WORK_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/n8n-ci-builds}"
SCRIPT="${DEPLOY_SCRIPT:-/home/yashree/development/fast-api/scripts/deploy-from-github.sh}"
if [ ! -x "$SCRIPT" ]; then chmod +x "$SCRIPT" || true; fi
set +e
OUT=$("$SCRIPT" 2>&1)
EC=$?
set -e
printf "%s\n" "$OUT"
echo "DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE=$EC"
if [ "$EC" -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "DEPLOY_RESULT=FAILED"
  exit "$EC"
fi
if ! printf "%s" "$OUT" | grep -q "DEPLOY_RESULT=SUCCESS"; then
  echo "DEPLOY_RESULT=FAILED"
  echo "ERROR: script finished without DEPLOY_RESULT=SUCCESS"
  exit 1
fi
exit 0'

nodes.name: SSH: Clone Build Push Deploy
nodes.notes: SSH credential: host 10.42.0.1, user yashree. Fails the node (red) if deploy script exits non-zero or misses DEPLOY_RESULT=SUCCESS.
